---
title: "groupAcode"
format: html
---

What can be done to improve this code?

`#create an object that stores a vector of 500 numbers from a standard normal distribution`{style="color: green"}

`x<-rnorm(0,1)`

`#create another object from the same data but squared`{style="color: green"}

`x^2`

`#make these into a scatter plot`{style="color: green"}

`scatterplot(x,y)`
